Actions.Text: REFERENCE CHANGED TO WAYS AND MEANS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Relates to special accidental death benefits paid to a deceased member's children
Summary: Increases the duration of special accidental death benefits paid to a deceased member's children.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general municipal law, in relation to special accidental death benefits paid to a deceased member's children
